text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we're walking through the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's with that crowd?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, we can win a whole bushel of carrots? That
sounds like it'd make for a nice gift!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing wrong with trying your luck once in a
while! What do we need to get a spin in?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have to get a raffle ticket first. I'll
grab some things for dinner real quick!

Hishi Amazon wraps up her shopping in an instant
and returns with a raffle ticket in hand.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's give it a go! Watch me win big!
She spins the tumbler's handle with gusto!

A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: We got the grand prize?! This can't be real! What should I do, Teach?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, they're gonna flip when they hear about
this!

From the sound of things, it seems like she wants
to take all of her dorm residents with her to the
resort, but...
choice_data_list: I think only two people can go...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hang on, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm... that changes things.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I can give this to someone who deserves it
for working so hard! Except everyone's been
working hard recently...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't do that! Everyone'd start fighting to
go, and things would get messy real quick! Man,
what now?
choice_data_list: Why don't you use it for yourself?
Why don't you use it for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Me? But I'm so busy with training...
choice_data_list: You can save it as a reward for later, then.

text_block_list.text:
I tell her how she'll probably have more time once
the Twinkle Series is over, so she'll have plenty of
chances to use the coupon then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's a solid point. If I use it, no one'd try
bickering over the coupon either!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's supposed to be a vacation for two, so I'll
need to invite someone to go with me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I've got just the person! You should come
with me, Teach! It'd be nice to go on a relaxing
getaway together!
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want to invite me?
Are you sure you want to invite me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? Of course I do! You're my
partner in crime!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Here, keep this tacked up somewhere in your
office so we don't forget!

And now we have one more thing to look forward
to.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! I did it, Teach! Man, it looks delicious!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Everyone back at Miho will love thi—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait. This single hamburger steak won't be
enough for the whole dorm...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There's gotta be some way I can feed 'em all...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know what to do! I'll try to memorize how it
tastes so I can recreate it for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, now that that's settled, it's time for a
taste test! You help too, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... This tastes great! How'd they make it so
good?!

We share the hamburger steak. It practically
melts in the mouth.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nice, this is just what I wanted! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
With this many carrots, I can make carrot
anything. Carrot curry, carrot stew...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, now. We can even have a carrot
barbecue party with all these carrots.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We can all hang out together, eating and
drinking... I think that's a solid plan!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll talk it over with Taiki! You should come too,
Teach!

That weekend, Miho Dormitory hosts a massive
barbecue party!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Dang it, I only got the third prize?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can feed everyone on one carrot
alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What should I even do with this? It wouldn't feel
right if I ate it all by myself...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Teach, is there anything you're cravin' tonight?

That night, the two of us have some delicious
curry together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Man, not the consolation prize!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Welp, that's a raffle for you. I guess it's pretty
rare to strike gold.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to change gears! Let's head home,
Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

It's a shame, but I guess luck wasn't on our side
tonight.
